description: The General settings group combines multiple types of tasks into one long pane, increasing scan cost for quick changes.
expected: A user changing one default should be able to isolate the right subsection quickly.
actual: Provider/auth, runtime environment, IDE, appearance, and notifications are stacked together in a single scrollable pane.
suggested_fix: Split the group further or add stronger subsection framing and stickier in-pane navigation.
